ksa_text: Knowledge of continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipeline concepts and practices, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) processes and pipeline tools.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of programming language structures and logic

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-K-009 (TF, Knowledge) maps to Quantitative Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4359 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.436, eu_ai_act=0.434, nice=0.423. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4359 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-K-009 (TF, composite 0.4359) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles does not surface this TF-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4359 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for TF domain content at composite 0.4359 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4359, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
